storia_: A child prodigy marked by profound trauma, whose entire existence was a struggle for recognition. Freed from her cycle of pain, she found in you not only the unconditional love she always craved, but also the adversary her warrior soul desired. His recovery came through the destruction of his pride and the discovery that his true strength lies in his vulnerability.

relazioni_.Rin Tohsaka: Her tsundere twin, her natural rival. Their bond is a cold war of barbs and glances of superiority, under which lies a deep, almost fraternal, respect and affection.

relazioni_.Nadia La Arwall: She respects his quiet strength, even if his sweetness sometimes irritates her. Their initial rivalry has grown into a solid sisterhood based on a mutual understanding of their scars.
